verified.title: 100% Verified

howItWorks.title: Getting Started is Easy
howItWorks.subtitle: Finding trusted childcare has never been easier. Get matched in minutes.

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.desc: Tell us about your family’s needs, language preferences, and any special requirements.

step2.title: Find Your Match
step2.desc: Browse verified, culturally-matched sitters in your area. Read reviews and check availability.

step3.title: Book with Confidence
step3.desc: Schedule care and relax knowing your kids are in safe, caring hands. Track everything in-app.

forParents.title: Find your village instantly.
forParents.desc: Stop calling daycares that are full. Browse profiles, check reviews, and book a verified sitter for tonight or next month.

points.point2: Special needs support with specialized filters.

forSitters.title: Earn meaningful income.
forSitters.desc: Turn your childcare experience into flexible earnings. Set your rates, choose your hours, and help newcomer families thrive.

footer.description: Connecting newcomer families with culturally-matched, verified childcare in Atlantic Canada.

header.title: Educational Activities for Every Child
header.description: Structured, educator-approved activities designed to make every session a growth opportunity. Each adventure targets a developmental skill — parents assign them before the session; sitters bring them to life.

search.placeholder: Search by title, skill, or goal...

booking.activeMessage: Booking Mode Active: Select activities below to add them to your reservation.

states.noMatchesHint: Try widening your filters or search constraints.

pagination.showing: Showing {count} of {total, plural, one {# activity} other {# activities}}

adventuresBenefits.heading: What Makes Our Activities Special?
adventuresBenefits.intro: Micro-adventures are structured, educational activities designed to engage children’s minds, bodies, and creativity. They’re called ’micro’ because they fit into 20-60 minute time blocks, and ’adventures’ because they make learning feel exciting, not like homework.

realLearning.title: Real Learning, Real Skills
realLearning.description: Every activity targets specific developmental goals—from fine motor skills and problem-solving to cultural awareness and emotional intelligence. Your child grows with every session.
realLearning.example: Science experiments teach cause-and-effect thinking and scientific method basics

perfectForStage.title: Perfect for Your Child’s Stage
perfectForStage.description: Each activity is tagged with appropriate age ranges and difficulty levels. Whether your child is 2 or 12, we have engaging options that challenge without frustrating.
perfectForStage.example: Storytime for ages 2-5, coding basics for ages 8-12

includedInBooking.title: Included in Your Booking
includedInBooking.description: All materials, supplies, and planning are included in your babysitter’s hourly rate. No surprise charges. No hidden fees. Just quality activities that maximize your childcare investment.
includedInBooking.example: Science experiments use household items; craft materials provided by sitter

tailoredToInterests.title: Tailored to Your Child’s Interests
tailoredToInterests.description: Choose from our library, request specific activities, or let babysitters create custom adventures based on your child’s unique interests. Obsessed with dinosaurs? Space? Princesses? We’ve got activities for that.
tailoredToInterests.example: Dinosaur dig excavation, rocket ship building, royal castle crafts

heritageHonored.title: Your Heritage, Honored
heritageHonored.description: Many activities incorporate cultural elements—traditional stories, cultural cooking, heritage crafts, language practice—helping your child maintain cultural identity while learning new skills.
heritageHonored.example: Making dumplings teaches measurements and cultural traditions simultaneously

handsOnNotScreenTime.title: Hands-On, Not Screen Time
handsOnNotScreenTime.description: Every micro-adventure prioritizes active engagement over passive entertainment. Real materials, real experiences, real learning—not just another YouTube video.
handsOnNotScreenTime.example: Building actual structures vs. watching building videos

difference.heading: The Difference
difference.traditionalDescription: Keeping kids safe while they entertain themselves with screens or toys. Passive supervision.
difference.haloDescription: Active, guided learning experiences that develop skills, build knowledge, and create lasting memories.

adventuresCTA.badge: Start Your Child’s Learning Journey Today
adventuresCTA.heading: Ready to Turn Babysitting Into Learning Time?
adventuresCTA.description: Join hundreds of parents who’ve discovered the littlëHALO difference. Book a sitter and choose your first micro-adventure today.
